title: Report on the proposed Heat Pump Investment Accelerator Competition subsidy scheme – Round 2
body: "The Subsidy Advice Unit (SAU) has published its report providing advice to DESNZ concerning the proposed Heat Pump Investment Accelerator Competition subsidy scheme – Round 2.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of DESNZ’s assessment of compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed Heat Pump Investment Accelerator Competition subsidy scheme – Round 2 by the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) case page "
